title: David Stephenson (rugby league, born 1958)
extract: David R. Stephenson (3 December 1958 – 14 March 2022) was an English rugby union and professional rugby league footballer who played in the 1970s, 1980s, and 1990s. He played club level rugby union for Fylde Rugby Club, and representative level rugby league for Great Britain, and at club level for Salford (two spells), Wigan, Leeds and Leigh, as a goal-kicking wing or centre.
